name: acid_10_compound_retract_unpacking
utterances: Uma is a parent of Vera.
Vera is a parent of Wynn.
Wynn is a parent of Xena.
If X is a parent of Y then X is an ancestor of Y.
If X is an ancestor of Y and Y is an ancestor of Z then X is an ancestor of Z.
Actually retract these: parent(vera, wynn) and parent(wynn, xena).
Vera is a parent of Wren.
Wren is a parent of Xena.
Summarize this: deterministic mutation should stay explicit.
